testCaseName: N-Of query requesting 2 of 3 mutations with aggregated action
query: default.filter(nOf(2, {nucleotideEquals(position:=241, symbol:='T', sequenceName:='main'), nucleotideEquals(position:=29734, symbol:='T', sequenceName:='main'), nucleotideEquals(position:=28330, symbol:='G', sequenceName:='main')})).groupBy({count:=count()})
